title: NISST Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 05 Lab Assistant, Multi Tasking Staff Posts
description: The National Institute of Secondary Steel Technology (NISST) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 05 Technical Assistant, Accountant, Lab Assistant, Multi Tasking Staff Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th pass, 12th, B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Any Degree can apply for the NISST Notification 2026. The interested applican...
